framework: Hormozi Value Equation: (Dream Outcome x Perceived Likelihood) / (Time Delay x Effort & Sacrifice)

offers.name: Cold Email Machine
offers.description: AI-powered cold email system for B2B lead gen

eval_criteria.Dream_outcome_clarity: Is the promised result crystal clear and desirable?
eval_criteria.Believability: Does the prospect believe this can actually deliver?
eval_criteria.Speed_to_value: Is the time-to-result fast and specific?
eval_criteria.Effort_reduction: Does it clearly minimize what the buyer has to do?
eval_criteria.Risk_reversal: Is there a strong guarantee that removes buyer risk?
